setting.label: Auto-detect Timeshift Folder
setting.help: Automatically search common Kodi locations for the timeshift folder. Disable to set path manually.

setting.label: Timeshift Folder (manual)
setting.help: Type a path directly. You can use special:// paths e.g. special://profile/addon_data/inputstream.ffmpegdirect/timeshift — or use the Kodi file manager to find the real path first.

setting.label: Output Folder
setting.help: Where to save the final .ts file. Use special:// paths or a full filesystem path e.g. /sdcard/Download

setting.label: Output Filename (no extension)
setting.help: Base filename for the output .ts file. Date/time will be appended automatically.

setting.label: Append Date and Time to Filename
